name: ICERI 2026 — 19th International Conference of Education, Research and Innovation
host: IATED (International Academy of Technology, Education and Development)
subset_axis: Education-level x discipline cross-tabulation: K-12 / Undergraduate / Graduate x STEM / Humanities / Mixed.
novel_analysis: 3 (education level) x 3 (discipline) cross-tab pooled effects with full interaction meta-regression; documents heterogeneity attributable to nesting (cell-level k limited but reported transparently). NOT in preprint.
notes: ICERI accepts virtual presentations, reducing travel commitment. IATED venue is well-indexed in Web of Science and acceptable for SFC graduation-research point requirements.
